# Configuration (environment variables)

Set via environment variables or a `.env` file (see `.env.example`).

| Variable | Type | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `APPROVAL_REQUIRED_TOOLS` | str | `'run_ssh_command,run_local_command,run_kubectl,run_db_explain'` |
| `APPROVAL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | int | `300` |
| `COMMENT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS` | int | `600` |
| `COMPRESS_HISTORY` | bool | `True` |
| `CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD` | float | `0.8` |
| `COPILOT_TOKEN` | str | `''` |
| `DATA_DIR` | Path | (computed) |
| `DIAGNOSTIC_MODEL` | str | `'copilot/gpt-4o'` |
| `DIAGNOSTIC_REASONING_EFFORT` | str | `'none'` |
| `EARLY_OUT_ENABLED` | bool | `True` |
| `EARLY_OUT_THRESHOLD` | float | `0.9` |
| `ENABLED_TOOLS` | str | `''` |
| `GITHUB_MODELS_BASE_URL` | str | `'https://models.github.ai/inference'` |
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | str | `''` |
| `MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS` | int | `3` |
| `MAX_ROUNDS` | int | `4` |
| `MAX_TOOL_CALLS_PER_AGENT` | int | `8` |
| `MODEL_PRICES_FILE` | Union | — |
| `MODERATOR_MODEL` | str | `'copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6'` |
| `MODERATOR_REASONING_EFFORT` | str | `'none'` |
| `PROMPTS_DIR` | Path | (computed) |
| `PROMPT_LANGUAGE` | str | `'en'` |
| `PROMPT_TEMPLATE` | str | `'default'` |
| `SKEPTIC_MODEL` | str | `'copilot/claude-sonnet-4.6'` |
| `SKEPTIC_REASONING_EFFORT` | str | `'none'` |
| `SSH_CONNECT_TIMEOUT` | int | `15` |
| `SSH_DEFAULT_USER` | str | `''` |
| `SSH_KEY_PATH` | str | `''` |
| `SUMMARY_MODEL` | str | `''` |
| `TOOLS_ENABLED` | bool | `True` |
| `TOOL_APPROVAL_REQUIRED` | bool | `True` |
| `WEB_HOST` | str | `'127.0.0.1'` |
| `WEB_PORT` | int | `8000` |
